topic_tags.portfolio-optimisation: Asset allocation, portfolio construction, QUBO formulations, Markowitz variants

methodology_tags.variational: General variational quantum algorithms (covers QAOA and VQE)

synthesis_tags.idea:quantum-advantage: A claim about where quantum outperforms classical
synthesis_tags.idea:hybrid-approach: Quantum-classical hybrid as the practical path
synthesis_tags.contradiction:classical-vs-quantum: Paper contradicts claims about quantum superiority
synthesis_tags.contradiction:scalability: Paper contradicts claims about scaling to real problems

synthesis_tags.limitation:no-empirical-validation: Theoretical claims not backed by experiment
